lines.english: Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
The Life of the World, the Sustainer of the Earth, has showered His Mercy;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਵਸੇ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan vase man maahee |
lines.english: the Guru's Feet have come to dwell within my mind.
The True One abides within my mind and body;
no place seems difficult to me now.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਗੀਕਾਰੁ ਕੀਆ ਤਿਨਿ ਕਰਤੈ ਦੁਖ ਕਾ ਡੇਰਾ ਢਾਹਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: angeekaar keea tin karatai dukh kaa dderaa dtaahiaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: The Creator has made me His Own. He has destroyed the city of sorrow. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਆਪੇ ਆਪੈ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh kare su aape aapai |
lines.english: Whatever He does, He does all by Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਤ ਦੁਸਮਣ ਸਭਿ ਸਜਣ ਹੋਏ ਏਕੋ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਆਹਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: doot dusaman sabh sajan hoe eko suaamee aahiaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: All the evil-doers and enemies have now become my friends. I long only for my Lord and Master. ||2||
No one can know His Ways.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣਿਆ ਸੰਤਾ ਨੋ ਆਪਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਭਰਮ ਭੁਲਾਵਾ ਲਾਹਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aapaniaa santaa no aap sahaaee prabh bharam bhulaavaa laahiaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: He Himself is the Helper and Support of His Saints. God has cast out my doubts and delusions. ||3||
His Lotus Feet are the Support of His humble servants.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਅਨੰਦ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਹਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੬॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: sehaj anand gaaveh gun govind prabh naanak sarab samaahiaa jeeo |4|36|43|
lines.english: In peace and pleasure, they sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe. O Nanak, God is permeating everywhere. ||4||36||43||
Twenty-four hours a day, they deal in the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਮੰਦਰੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: so sach mandar jit sach dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: True is that temple, within which one meditates on the True Lord.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਰਿਦਾ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: so ridaa suhelaa jit har gun gaaeeai |
lines.english: Blessed is that heart, within which the Lord's Glorious Praises are sung.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਧਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਵਸਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਸਚੇ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਕੁਰਬਾਣੋ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saa dharat suhaavee jit vaseh har jan sache naam vittahu kurabaano jeeo |1|
lines.english: Beautiful is that land, where the Lord's humble servants dwell. I am a sacrifice to the True Name. ||1||
His Creative Power and His Bounties cannot be described.
The extent of the True Lord's Greatness cannot be known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਿਆਇ ਧਿਆਇ ਜੀਵਹਿ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਸਚੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਮਨਿ ਮਾਣੋ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: dhiaae dhiaae jeeveh jan tere sach sabad man maano jeeo |2|
lines.english: Your humble servants live by meditating, meditating on You. Their minds treasure the True Word of the Shabad. ||2||
The Praises of the True One are obtained by great good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਤੇਰੈ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੋ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: rang rate terai tudh bhaaveh sach naam neesaano jeeo |3|
lines.english: Those who are imbued with Your Love are pleasing to You. The True Name is their Banner and Insignia. ||3||
No one knows the limits of the True Lord.
By Guru's Grace, the Glorious Praises of the Lord are sung.
In all places and interspaces, the True One is pervading.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਾਣੋ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੭॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sach dhiaaeeai sad hee antarajaamee jaano jeeo |4|37|44|
lines.english: O Nanak, meditate forever on the True One, the Searcher of hearts, the Knower of all. ||4||37||44||
Beautiful is the night, and beautiful is the day,
when one joins the Society of the Saints and chants the Ambrosial Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੜੀ ਮੂਰਤ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਪਲ ਵੰਞਹਿ ਜੀਵਣੁ ਸਫਲੁ ਤਿਥਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gharree moorat simarat pal vanyeh jeevan safal tithaaee jeeo |1|
lines.english: If you remember the Lord in meditation for a moment, even for an instant, then your life will become fruitful and prosperous. ||1||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
Inwardly and outwardly, the Lord God is always with us.
Remembering the Naam, the Name of the Lord, all sinful mistakes are erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਭਉ ਭਰਮੁ ਖੋਇਆ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਦੇਖਾ ਸਭਨੀ ਜਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: bhai bhau bharam khoeaa gur poorai dekhaa sabhanee jaaee jeeo |2|
lines.english: Fear, dread and doubt have been dispelled by the Perfect Guru; now, I see God everywhere. ||2||
God is All-powerful, Vast, Lofty and Infinite.
The Naam is overflowing with the nine treasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਅੰਤਿ ਮਧਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸੋਈ ਦੂਜਾ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aad ant madh prabh soee doojaa lavai na laaee jeeo |3|
lines.english: In the beginning, in the middle, and in the end, there is God. Nothing else even comes close to Him. ||3||
I am a beggar, begging for the dust of the feet of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹਿ ਦਾਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਜਨੁ ਮਾਗੈ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੮॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: dehi daan naanak jan maagai sadaa sadaa har dhiaaee jeeo |4|38|45|
lines.english: Servant Nanak begs for this gift: let me meditate on the Lord, forever and ever. ||4||38||45||
Take pity on me, O my Lord, Merciful to the meek.
You are here, and You are hereafter.
All beings and creatures were created by You.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
The tongue lives by chanting and meditating on the Lord's Name.
The Supreme Lord God is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਕਰਤੇ ਮੈ ਧਰ ਓਟ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tudh bin avar na koee karate mai dhar ott tumaaree jeeo |1|
lines.english: Without You, there is no other, O Creator. You are my Support and my Protection. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਅਵਖਧੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: naam avakhadh jin jan terai paaeaa |
lines.english: Your humble servant, who obtains the Medicine of the Naam,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਸੋ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਜੂਐ ਹਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin seviaa tin hee sukh paaeaa so janam na jooai haaree jeeo |2|
lines.english: Those who serve the Lord find peace; they do not lose their lives in the gamble. ||2||
